{{Quote|I'm waiting for Big Burke to ask me.|[[Latara/Legends|Latara]]|<ref name="The Raich">{{Ewoks|The Raich}}</ref>}}
'''Big Burke''' was an [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] who lived on the [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]] in [[Bright Tree Village/Legends|Bright Tree Village]]. Big Burke was an eligible Ewok [[Gender/Legends|male]], and around [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] he was old enough to attend the [[Shadow Night Festival/Legends|Shadow Night Festival]]. The young Ewok [[Latara/Legends|Latara]] believed that Big Burke would ask her to the Festival after she failed to be asked by [[Tak (Ewok)|Tak]]. However, Big Burke seemed unaware of Latara, and he failed to ask her.

==Appearances==
*{{Ewoks|The Raich}} {{1stm}}
